name: recipe-match
description: Local full-stack workflow for the Recipe Match hackathon MVP

scripts.setup: npm ci --prefix backend && npm ci --prefix frontend
scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others --names backend,frontend --prefix-colors green,cyan "npm --prefix backend run dev" "npm --prefix frontend run dev"
scripts.verify: npm --prefix backend test && npm --prefix backend run test:coverage && npm --prefix frontend test && npm --prefix frontend run lint && npm --prefix frontend run test:coverage && npm --prefix frontend run build && npm --prefix frontend run test:e2e && npm run test:fullstack
